**Analyzing strike details**

The heading "dalle ore 10 alle ore 18" suggests a time range, but the body states "Dalle ore 9 alle ore 18," which seems more precise. I should go with the body time frame for the start and end dates of the strike on November 16, 2025, setting it from 9 AM to 6 PM. Additionally, since the strike is focused on the regional service in Lombardia, that will be classified as "REGIONAL" with location code ["03"].
